POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: lkeap.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CancelTask
<公共请求参数>

{

}
CancelTask.title: 取消任务

ChatCompletions.title: 流式请求

ChatCompletions.document: 在输出最终回答之前，模型会先输出一段思维链内容，以提升最终答案的准确性。ReasoningContent表示思维链内容，Content表示回答的内容。仅deepseek-r1推理模型支持返回ReasoningContent参数
ChatCompletions.title: 思维链示例

CreateReconstructDocumentFlow.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: lkeap.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CreateReconstructDocumentFlow
<公共请求参数>

{
    "FileType": "PDF",
    "FileUrl": "http://example.com/example.pdf"
}
CreateReconstructDocumentFlow.title: 接口请求成功示例

CreateSplitDocumentFlow.document: 对外部在线文档进行拆分
CreateSplitDocumentFlow.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: lkeap.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CreateSplitDocumentFlow
<公共请求参数>

{
    "FileType": "PDF",
    "FileName": "example.pdf",
    "FileUrl": "https://qidian-qbot-1251316161.cos.ap-guangzhou.myqcloud.com/public/example/example.pdf",
    "FileStartPageNumber": 1,
    "FileEndPageNumber": 2,
    "Config": {
        "EnableMllm": true
    }
}
CreateSplitDocumentFlow.title: 创建PDF拆分任务

GetEmbedding.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: lkeap.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: GetEmbedding

GetEmbedding.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: lkeap.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: GetEmbedding
<公共请求参数>

{
    "Model": "youtu-embedding-llm-v1",
    "Inputs": [
        "1"
    ],
    "TextType": "query",
    "Instruction": "query:"
}
GetEmbedding.title: 获取特征向量-自定义Instruction
